item.title: Tetris Drift
item.author: Intisar Bin Naim
item.description: Tetris Drift is a Tetris 🧱 clone. This game was made for learning purposes along with these other clones – Crashy FO Arrogant Invader Screenshots Download Tetris Drift

item.title: Arrogant Invader
item.author: Intisar Bin Naim
item.description: Arrogant Invader is my own version of the game Space Invaders 👾 This game was made for learning purposes along with these other clones – Tetris Drift Crashy FO. Screenshots Download Arrogant Invader v1.0.0

item.title: Crahy FO
item.author: Intisar Bin Naim
item.description: Crashy FO is a Flappy Bird clone where you play as FO the UFO 🛸 instead of Faby the bird. I made this game for learning purposes along with these other clones – Tetris Drift Arrogant Invader Screenshots Download Crashy FO v1.0.0
